message:
Fix watch channel multiple_receivers test (asupersync-k96)

The test had subscribe() called BEFORE send(), but the comment claimed
it was called after. This caused rx3.has_changed() to return true
(since it was subscribed at version 0, then send() bumped to version 1).

Fix: Move subscribe() call after tx.send(42) so rx3 starts at
version 1 and correctly has no pending change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
